title: Fix Category Delete Icon and Standardize Table Row Colors
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want category tables to have a visible delete icon and consistent row styling with hover effects, so that the interface is functional and visually polished.
description:
Fix a missing delete icon in the categories table and update the DataTable configuration to use consistent row colors instead of alternating stripes.

## Fixes
1. Restore missing delete icon for category rows
2. Remove alternating row colors from the categories DataTable
3. Add hover effect so rows change color when moused over, making them look clickable
acceptance_criteria: Delete icon is visible on category rows
Category DataTable uses uniform row color instead of alternating stripes
Mouse cursor changes on hover to indicate clickability
Applied to both metrics and object offcanvas screens
ux_changes: Fixed missing delete icon, removed alternating row colors for cleaner appearance, and added hover effects to category table rows for better interactivity cues.
implementation_notes: DataTable class was updated to remove striped rows. Hover CSS added for visual feedback. Applied to both metrics and object offcanvas screens.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the icon and row colors. Ryan later requested hover effects on rows to make them look clickable when selecting a line of business, which was implemented.
